5819165.note: DU uses both du.ac.in and uod.ac.in. DULS (DU Library System) is a DU-specific acronym; generic distance-learning acronyms (SOL, NCWEB) are handled globally in ALLOWED_FUNCTIONAL_LABELS.

664001.notes: HP University Shimla runs student portals on hpushimla.in (separate from primary hpuniv.ac.in).

664197.notes: Punjabi University Patiala. Shortname 'pup' = Punjabi University Patiala. SheerID-listed pbi.ac.in is stale. Exam portal at pupexamination.ac.in and CDOE admissions portal at admissions.cdoepunjabiuniversity.in are the operator-verified student logins; force-accept the seeds because organic discovery surfaced punjabiuniversity.ac.in/Dalbir/Login.aspx (admin/staff) instead.

663894.notes: Patna University. Shortname is 'pu' only — NOT 'pup' (that's Punjabi University Patiala). pu.bihar-ums.com is now in KNOWN_INSTANCE_BLOCKLIST (so non-Patna OrgIDs don't pick it up via DDG); force_accept_seed_urls=true is required so Patna's own seed URL bypasses the pre-filter blocklist check. Bihar UMS subdomains other than pu.bihar-ums.com that legitimately belong to Patna can be added to seed_urls similarly.

5411058.notes: Chaudhary Charan Singh University. Samarth tenants on both samarth.edu.in and samarth.ac.in including the lms- functional prefix (Bug 31). Fee portal lives on the abbreviated sibling domain ccsuforms.in (Bug 33).

4816187.notes: Sathyabama. All university portals are JS-rendered SPAs that redirect to a homepage when unauthenticated, so static heuristics can't validate them. Force-accept the curated seed URLs and probe sathyabama.ac.in directly for T&C.

10207980.notes: LNCT (Lakshmi Narain College of Technology) Bhopal. Real student portals live on the lnctu.ac.in sibling domain — accsoft2.lnctu.ac.in/Accsoft2/studentLogin.aspx (Accsoft SIS) and lnctcet.lnctu.ac.in/student-login. portal.lnct.ac.in is kept as a generic fallback. The LNCT group has many sibling campus domains (lnctrishiraj.ac.in, lncte.ac.in, lnctworldschools.com, lnctuj.com) that surface as siblings via DDG; with MAX_SIBLING_ROOTS_TO_PROBE=3 these no longer eat the discovery budget. force_accept_seed_urls=true ships the GT URLs past validation; otherwise organic discovery surfaced lnctalumni.in (alumni site).

4816763.notes: Veer Narmad South Gujarat University (Surat). Real student portals: vnsgu.net (primary), oes.vnsguapps.in (Online Exam System), and the Samarth tenants vnsgu / lms-vnsgu / vnsgurec (admitted via R3/R4 with exact_shortnames + Bug 31 lms- prefix strip). osm.vnsguapps.in is the On-Screen Marking portal — examiner/evaluator only, NOT a student login — explicitly blocked. DO NOT add vnsguapps.in to extra_effective_domains: vnsguapps.in has wildcard DNS that responds to most SUBDOMAIN_PROBE_LIST names, causing ~626 DNS failures and a budget blowup. The two seed_urls are the only vnsguapps.in URLs we want.

10253961.notes: MIT ADT University Pune (Maharashtra). Real student portals: student.mitapps.in/itxlogin (React SPA — root path returns a 44-byte HTML shell that fails the static hard gate) and oes.mitapps.in/login (Online Exam System — HEAD 500, GET 200). force_accept_seed_urls=true ships these directly past validation; otherwise the SPA shell would be rejected before Playwright runs. mituniversityindia.edu.in is MIT University Shillong (Meghalaya) — different institution; parent domain is in KNOWN_INSTANCE_BLOCKLIST. T&C lookup pinned to mituniversity.ac.in (the SheerID primary).

10490577.notes: School of Open Learning, Delhi University. Distinct OrgID from the main DU entry (5819165). Samarth tenants soldu.samarth.ac.in / soldu.samarth.edu.in admit cleanly via R3/R4 with exact_shortnames=['soldu', ...] (otherwise the auto-derived 'du' wouldn't match 'soldu'). Student portal at web.sol.du.ac.in/student-login returns 403 to crawler-shaped User-Agent strings, so the seed URL can't be validated by the static fetcher — force_accept_seed_urls=true skips validation and emits the URL directly. The Bar-Code/Roll-No labels added to STUDENT_IDENTITY_FIELD_SIGNALS still help on any other SOL-style portal that surfaces organically.

5878908.notes: Maharishi Markandeshwar University (Mullana). erp.mmumullana.org is the student ERP (shared admin+student system, neutral login title — kept by the relaxed ERP gate, Bug 1). onlinelms.mmumullana.org has a JS modal login: js_renderer's modal-click fallback opens it before validation.

663980.notes: GJUST Hisar (Haryana). gjuonline.ac.in is GJUST's online portal. ddegjust.ac.in is distance ed. gjum.samarth.edu.in is a DIFFERENT university (GJUM Moradabad, UP) — do NOT include. Shortname 'gjum' is excluded from exact_shortnames so the consolidate-membership re-check correctly rejects gjum.* hosts as cross-university contamination.

664213.notes: Jai Narain Vyas University (Jodhpur). Student portals: studentportal.jnvuiums.in, erp.jnvuiums.in/Loginpage.aspx (University IUMS), erp.jnvuiums.in/Loginpage_Col.aspx (College IUMS). All other erp.jnvuiums.in/* login pages are admin/staff (Employee, Affiliation, Examiner, Practical-Examiner) and are blocked. jnvu.online/Login.aspx is the central staff/admin login and is blocked. T&C lookup pinned to jnvu.edu.in (SheerID primary).

3840805.notes: St. Xavier's College Ranchi. Student portal lives on sxcran.org (.NET ASPX); T&C / PrivacyPolicy lives on the separate ac.in domain (sxcran.ac.in/Admission/PrivacyPolicy), so tc_domain is pinned to sxcran.ac.in. Force-accept the .aspx seed so it survives host-dedup as the canonical URL even when same_host_probes also synthesises /Student/Login, /Account/Login, etc. on the same host.

3832673.notes: MAIT (Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology). ERP at erp.mait.ac.in/maithelix2/ (the maithelix2 path is the active login surface — /MAITSTUDENT/ and /maithelix/ are dead). app.edumarshal.com is the third-party platform reached via mait.ac.in homepage Portals → ERP link; edumarshal.com is in KNOWN_SHARED_PLATFORM_PATTERNS so rule-C accepts it without a static login form.

3830553.notes: ITM University Gwalior. MIS portal lives at the non-standard path /itmzone/login.php (ITM Group convention). The SheerID-listed itmuniverse.in is currently down (connection refused). LMS / exam portals are surfaced organically; the MIS seed is force-accepted because the path-probe set doesn't yet include /itmzone/.

3833683.notes: MLSU (Mohanlal Sukhadia University, Udaipur). Portals live on the sumsraj.com platform — student / portal / examination tenants. erp/elearning/e-library subdomains of mlsu.ac.in are DNS-dead. sumsraj.com is in KNOWN_SHARED_PLATFORM_PATTERNS so rule-C accepts these tenants; SHARED_PLATFORM_TENANT_PROBES would also surface them organically (force-accept pins the canonical URLs).

663905.notes: Guru Ghasidas Vishwavidyalaya (GGU/GGV). Samarth tenant prefix is 'ggv' (not 'ggu' as the auto-derived SheerID shortname would imply); exact_shortnames pins the R3/R4 tenant gate. /admin/login on www.ggu.ac.in is the Django admin backend — explicitly blocked. After this fix, the generic ADMIN_URL_PATH_TOKENS filter would also reject the /admin/ URL pre-fetch.

10329730.notes: Subodh PG College. Standalone ERP — the login form lives at the bare apex (subodhpgcollege.in/), not at any of the SUBDOMAIN_PROBE_LIST paths. The sibling-root probe fix would now find this organically; force-accept pins the canonical URL. subodhpgcollege.com returns 503.

7114463.notes: Barkatullah University Bhopal. Student SIS lives on the MP state-government MPOnline platform; the per-uni code in the URL path is BARKATULLAH which we can't derive from the SheerID shortname 'bubhopal'. bubhopal.ac.in returns TooManyRedirects. The new SHARED_PLATFORM_TENANT_PROBES entry probes bubhopal.mponline.gov.in/ and follows the redirect, but the override pins the canonical login URL with the per-uni code so the sheet shows the right destination.

5967310.notes: Dev Bhoomi Uttarakhand University. ERP and Moodle DNS were intermittently down during a discovery run; force-accept pins the canonical URLs so a transient outage doesn't drop them. career.dbuu.ac.in is the placement / career-cell portal — explicitly blocked. The new NON_STUDENT_SUBDOMAIN_BLOCKLIST also catches `career` generically, but the per-OrgID block is belt-and-suspenders.

3810018.notes: AKTU affiliated college in Uttar Pradesh. No own student portal — students use AKTU centralized ERP at erp.aktu.ac.in

664530.notes: ERP on Digiicampus platform. shobhit.digiicampus.com and lms.shobhit.online both point to same Digiicampus instance. crms/dms/euniversity subdomains DNS was down during run.

10054970.notes: Student portal at ncrims.in (CONNECT NCRIMS platform). Primary domain ncrinstituteofmedicalsciences.com has no portal. Affiliated to Ch. Charan Singh University Meerut not AKTU.

3833175.notes: MCM College Meerut affiliated to CCSU (Chaudhary Charan Singh University). Student portal is CCSU Samarth. erp.mcm.ac.in DNS was down during run.

3833431.notes: Student portal on campus365.io platform. microtek.ac.in/digital-form is a student form page not a login portal.

664354.notes: Samarth tenant is kmclu (not uafulucknow/kmcuafu). kmcluadm is admin tenant blocked since peer kmclu exists. uafulucknow.ac.in DNS was down during run.

3830520.notes: Student portal at /itcps/student/login.php. ERP at itcps-erp subdomain. erp.itcollege.ac.in DNS was down during run.

10200454.notes: University of North Bengal. Student exam/portal lives on the dedicated nbuexams.net domain (separate from SheerID primary nbu.ac.in). Gemini broad search and homepage crawls on nbu.ac.in surfaced only marketing pages with no login form; force-accept the nbuexams.net seeds so the canonical portals are emitted. ir.nbu.ac.in is the institutional repository, not a student portal.

3838423.notes: Shyam Lal College (DU North East, Delhi). College-level Samarth tenant lives on uod.ac.in (DU runs both du.ac.in and uod.ac.in for college tenants). The auto-derived 'du' from shyamlale.du.ac.in spuriously admits DU-wide portals (appsms.du.ac.in, dup.du.ac.in) which are the central university login, not the college's. exact_shortnames pins R3/R4/R6 to slc/shyamlal so DU-wide subdomains stop being treated as the college's own.

3848006.notes: Zeal Education Society's Zeal College of Engineering & Research. Real student portals: learner.zealerp.in (Zeal ERP platform) and student.zcoerapps.in/itxlogin (ITX SPA — JS-rendered, static probes all DROP). zcoer.in/wp-login.php is the WordPress admin backend for the marketing site, not a student portal — blocked.

664115.notes: Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada University. Real student portals: Samarth tenant bamu.samarth.edu.in, DigitalUniversity (bamuaapp, bamuaclc) and dulive.ac (bamuaops). bamu.samarth.ac.in was rejected as instance-blocklist during the failing run — force_accept_seed_urls bypasses that for the canonical .edu.in tenant. bamukrc.knimbus.com is the knowledge-resource library (not the student SIS); online.bamu.ac.in/unic/indrad is the IndRAD researcher portal — both blocked.

664236.notes: University of Rajasthan, Jaipur. Real student Samarth tenant lives on samarth.ac.in (uniraj.samarth.ac.in), NOT samarth.edu.in. The samarth.ac.in apex is in KNOWN_INSTANCE_BLOCKLIST (it's the employee/faculty Samarth root) so the tenant would be rejected at pre-filter; force_accept_seed_urls bypasses that for this operator-verified URL. Organic discovery only surfaced ide/idol/sol/hostel/result subdomains under uniraj.ac.in (all rejected as admission portals or no-login).

663985.notes: Maharshi Dayanand University, Rohtak. Samarth tenant prefix is 'mdu' but the auto-derived SheerID shortname is 'mdurohtak'; without exact_shortnames the strict-membership re-check rejects mdu.samarth.edu.in as a non-matching tenant ('mdu' ∉ auto_shortnames ['mdurohtak']). force_accept_seed_urls also pins the SIS (student.mdu.ac.in), DMS (dms.mdu.ac.in) and Moodle (ilms.mdu.ac.in) URLs that organic discovery missed (homepage crawl was dominated by 404 PDFs).

10202495.notes: St Joseph's University, Bengaluru. Real student portals live on linways.com tenant subdomains (sjuv4.linways.com /ams/student/login and sju.linways.com/student/) plus the Knimbus library tenant (sjc.knimbus.com). Organic discovery surfaced only linways.com marketing pages (/pages/...) which redirect to the bare platform root and are rejected as such; force_accept_seed_urls pins the canonical tenant URLs. linways.com and knimbus.com are already in KNOWN_SHARED_PLATFORM_PATTERNS so no extra_effective_domains entry is required.

664220.notes: Maharaja Ganga Singh University, Bikaner. Real student portals live on a third-party univindia.net platform under the /MGSU/ path. mgsubikaner.ac.in was returning HTTP 429 (rate-limited) during discovery so every uniraj-side candidate dropped; force_accept_seed_urls bypasses validation so the ground-truth univindia.net URLs are emitted directly. extra_effective_domains keeps the host on the OrgID's allow-list if it ever surfaces organically.

10151512.notes: Institute of Technical Education and Research (Siksha 'O' Anusandhan, Bhubaneswar). Student portal lives on soaportals.com at the SPA route /StudentPortalSOA/#/. soa.ac.in homepage and research subdomain only carry marketing / news / event pages (no login form, fail the hard gate); force_accept_seed_urls pins the canonical portal URL. extra_effective_domains keeps soaportals.com on the OrgID allow-list.

664229.notes: Nims University Rajasthan. Real student LMS lives on the separate nims-lms.com domain. nimsuniversity.org/news/wp-login.php is the WordPress backend for the news section (admin/staff); lms.nimsuniversity.org/login/index.php is a parallel Moodle but operator-verified GT is nims-lms.com. force_accept_seed_urls=true ships nims-lms.com past validation; extra_effective_domains keeps it on the OrgID allow-list.

664499.notes: K.R. Mangalam University. Real student portals: krmu.icloudems.com/corecampus (iCloudEMS tenant) and lms.krmangalam.edu.in (Moodle session_2025-26). Organic discovery kept the library knimbus tenant (library.krmangalam.edu.in) instead. icloudems.com is a multi-tenant SIS platform — added to extra_effective_domains so krmu.icloudems.com is admitted via R1/R2; force_accept_seed_urls=true ships both canonical URLs past validation.
